revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{template category|description=This category automatically includes all templates using {{tl|ambox}} which have their ''name'' parameter set.}} {{CategoryTOC}} ...'
sl:Kategorija:Sporočilna polja za članke
r2.7.2+) (Robot: Adding fa, fr, ja, ko, oc, simple, zh
revision.text:
{{template category|description=This category automatically includes all templates using {{tl|ambox}} which have their ''name'' parameter set.}} {{CategoryTOC}} [[Category:Wikipedia message box templates]]
[[fa:رده:الگوهای پیامی مقاله‌ها]] [[fr:Catégorie:Bandeau d'article]] [[ko:분류:문서 알림 상자]] [[ja:Category:記事メッセージボックス]] [[oc:Categoria:Bendèl d'article]] [[simple:Category:Article message boxes]] [[sl:Kategorija:Sporočilna polja za članke]] [[zh:Category:條目訊息模板]]

revision.comment: r2.7.1) (Robot: Adding [[uk:Категорія:Шаблони-повідомлення для статей]]

{{template category|description=This category automatically includes all templates using {{tl|ambox}} which have their ''name'' parameter set.}} {{CategoryTOC}} [[Category:Wikipedia message box templates]]

revision.comment: pt. interwiki

revision.comment: [[User:Addbot|Bot:]] Migrating 11 interwiki links, now provided by [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] on [[d:q7069424]]
+cat
ce, add hidden cat
unhide: pls do not hide any category except for very good reasons; people should be able to find pages such as this one
Formatting changes
+Category used by module
+see also link
{{Category TOC}} → {{CatAutoTOC}} on [[Category:Template Category TOC without CatAutoTOC on category with 301–600 pages|categories with 301–600 pages]]
14 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Category:Article_message_templates]]
14 revisions imported
Copying from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Articles tagged as templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (65 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (55 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (56 members)
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Category:Article_message_templates]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Category:Article_message_templates]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
revision.text: [[Category:enwiki linked categories]][[en:Category:Article_message_templates]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Category:Article_message_templates]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude> [[en:Category:Article message templates]] [[en:Category:Article message templates]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
revision.text: [[Category:enwiki linked categories]][[en:Category:Article_message_templates]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Category:Article_message_templates]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude> [[en:Category:Article message templates]] [[en:Category:Article message templates]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: remove obsolete category Wikipedia overwrites
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
1 revision imported
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q7069424)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q7069424)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:

{{template category}}
